name: Peppered Meat Loaf
recipeInstructions:
Serves 6 to 8
Combine all ingredients except potatoes and sauce; mix well and shape into a loaf.
Place potatoes in bottom of Crock-Pot.
Top potatoes with meat loaf.
Mix sauce ingredients together well.
Pour sauce over all.
Cover and cook on Low for 8 to 12 hours.
